infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CricVault uses your camera so you can add match photos to your cricket diary.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CricVault accesses your photo library so you can attach match photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: CricVault saves match photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CricVault can use your location to auto-fill match venues.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: CricVault adds your fixtures to your calendar so you never miss a match.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: CricVault can set reminders for upcoming fixtures.

plugins.photosPermission: CricVault accesses your photo library so you can attach match photos.
